code:
sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Utilisateur participant WC as Web Client participant CN as Core NGINX
:80 participant Voyage as Voyage Service
:3003 participant Payment as Payment Service
:3005 participant AI as AI Service
:3004 participant PG as PostgreSQL
:5432 participant Redis as Redis
:6379 participant Kafka as Kafka
:9092 participant Stripe as 💳 Stripe API rect rgb(Logistics_Warehouse) Note over User,Voyage: Phase 1: Sélection Vol User->>WC: Sélectionne vol
(Logistics_StockLevel) WC->>WC: Add to cart
(Logistics_Warehouse) User->>WC: Click "Réserver" WC->>CN: POST /api/v1/bookings
{Logistics_StockLevel}
Authorization: Bearer JWT CN->>CN: Validate JWT (Logistics_StockLevel) CN->>Voyage: Forward to Voyage
localhost:3003/bookings end rect rgb(Logistics_FleetManagement) Note over Voyage,Kafka: Phase 2: Création Réservation Voyage->>Voyage: Extract userId from JWT Voyage->>PG: BEGIN transaction Note right of PG: 🔄 ACID transaction
pour cohérence Voyage->>PG: INSERT booking
{Logistics_DeliveryRoute} PG-->>Voyage: Booking created (Logistics_TrackingNumber) Voyage->>Redis: Store booking temp
key: "booking:temp:bookingId"
TTL: 15min Note right of Redis: ⏱️ Timeout si paiement
échoue après 15min Voyage->>Kafka: Publish event
Topic: "voyage.booking.created"
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} Note left of Kafka: Event-Driven Architecture
- Decoupling services
- Async processing
- Audit trail Voyage-->>CN: 201 Created
{Logistics_Warehouse} CN-->>WC: 201 Created end rect rgb(Logistics_FleetManagement) Note over WC,Stripe: Phase 3: Demande Paiement WC->>CN: POST /api/v1/payments/intent
{Logistics_TrackingNumber}
Authorization: Bearer JWT CN->>Payment: Forward to Payment
localhost:3005/payments/intent Payment->>Payment: Extract userId from JWT Payment->>PG: Verify booking exists
SELECT * FROM bookings
WHERE id = bookingId AND userId = userId alt Booking Non Trouvé ❌ PG-->>Payment: null Payment-->>CN: 404 Not Found
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} CN-->>WC: 404 Error WC->>User: ❌ Erreur réservation else Booking Trouvé ✅ PG-->>Payment: Booking found Payment->>Stripe: Create PaymentIntent
POST /v1/payment_intents
{Logistics_DeliveryRoute),
currency: "eur",
metadata: {Logistics_StockLevel}} Stripe-->>Payment: PaymentIntent created
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} Payment->>PG: INSERT payment
{Logistics_DeliveryRoute} Payment->>Kafka: Publish event
Topic: "payment.intent.created"
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} Payment-->>CN: 200 OK
{Logistics_TrackingNumber} CN-->>WC: 200 OK end end rect rgb(Logistics_FleetManagement) Note over WC,Stripe: Phase 4: Paiement Stripe (Logistics_FleetManagement) WC->>WC: Initialize Stripe.js
with clientSecret WC->>User: Affiche formulaire carte
(Logistics_TrackingNumber) User->>WC: Saisit infos carte
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) WC->>Stripe: POST /v1/payment_intents/:id/confirm
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
{Logistics_DeliveryRoute} Note right of Stripe: 🔒 Sécurité PCI-DSS
- Carte jamais envoyée à notre backend
- Stripe gère tout
- Tokenization automatique alt Paiement Réussi ✅ Stripe-->>WC: PaymentIntent succeeded WC->>WC: Display success message WC->>User: ✅ Paiement accepté else Paiement Échoué ❌ Stripe-->>WC: PaymentIntent failed
(Logistics_StockLevel) WC->>User: ❌ "Paiement refusé"
(Logistics_Warehouse) end end rect rgb(Logistics_StockLevel) Note over Stripe,Kafka: Phase 5: Webhook Stripe (Logistics_TrackingNumber) Stripe->>Payment: POST /webhooks/stripe
Stripe-Signature header
{Logistics_TrackingNumber}} Payment->>Payment: Verify signature
stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(Logistics_FleetManagement) alt Signature Invalide ❌ Payment-->>Stripe: 400 Bad Request Note right of Payment: Protection contre
webhooks forgés else Signature Valide ✅ Payment->>PG: UPDATE payment
SET status = "SUCCEEDED"
WHERE stripePaymentIntentId = id Payment->>PG: UPDATE booking
SET status = "CONFIRMED"
WHERE id = bookingId Payment->>Redis: Delete temp booking
DEL "booking:temp:bookingId" Payment->>Kafka: Publish event
Topic: "payment.succeeded"
{Logistics_Warehouse} Payment-->>Stripe: 200 OK end end rect rgb(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Note over Kafka,User: Phase 6: Traitement Async (Logistics_Warehouse) Kafka->>Voyage: Consume event
"payment.succeeded" Voyage->>PG: SELECT booking details Voyage->>Voyage: Generate confirmation email
(Logistics_StockLevel) Voyage->>User: 📧 Email confirmation
+ PDF billet Kafka->>AI: Consume event
"voyage.booking.created" AI->>PG: Get user profile
+ booking history AI->>AI: Update ML model
(Logistics_FleetManagement) Note right of AI: 🤖 AI learning
from user behavior AI->>Redis: Update recommendations
key: "reco:userId" end rect rgb(Logistics_Warehouse) Note over WC,User: Phase 7: Confirmation Frontend loop Polling every 2s WC->>CN: GET /api/v1/bookings/:bookingId CN->>Voyage: Forward request Voyage->>PG: SELECT booking
WHERE id = bookingId alt Status = CONFIRMED ✅ PG-->>Voyage: Booking confirmed Voyage-->>CN: 200 OK
{Logistics_Warehouse} CN-->>WC: 200 OK WC->>WC: Stop polling WC->>WC: Redirect /bookings/:id WC->>User: ✅ Affiche confirmation
+ détails voyage else Status = PENDING ⏳ PG-->>Voyage: Booking still pending Voyage-->>CN: 200 OK
{Logistics_Warehouse} CN-->>WC: 200 OK (Logistics_StockLevel) Note right of WC: ⏱️ Après 15min
réservation annulée
automatiquement end end end Note over User,Kafka: 📊 Performance Réservation
Create booking: ~100-150ms
Payment intent: ~500-800ms (Logistics_TrackingNumber)
Confirmation: ~1-2s (Logistics_TrackingNumber)
Email: ~3-5s (Logistics_FleetManagement)

🔒 Fiabilité
- Transaction ACID (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
- Idempotency keys (Logistics_StockLevel)
- Webhook retry (Logistics_StockLevel)
- Event sourcing (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
